version.name: 0.42-beta
version.author: Mantrika Sound
version.changelog:
v0.42-beta Changelog:
1. Underlying UI Optimization: Reduced main thread intrusion for smoother performance. 1. UI 底层优化：更少入侵主线程；
2. Loudness: Added new Actions: Normalize to -23 LUFS and Match selected items' loudness to median. 2. Loudness：新增Action：normalize to -23 LUFS、拉平选中的item响度值为中位数；
3. Item Recognition: Enhanced target item detection with smart-skip capabilities. (Beneficiaries: Radial Menu and FX Search). 3. Item识别：对目标item判断更精准，拥有智能跳过能力；受益者：Radial Menu和FX Search；
4. Drag-and-Drop Optimization: Dragging into empty space below tracks or items will now intelligently create appropriate new tracks based on content. (Beneficiaries: Radial Menu, FX Search, and Sample Broker). 4. 拖拽功能优化：对于轨道和item区域下方空白处，会根据内容智能新建合适的轨道；受益者：Radial Menu、FX
5. Flux: Continued refinements to Envelope UI details. 5. Flux：优化Envelope的ui交互细节
-- Mantrika Team --2026-03.22
